name: File Creator
description: Create and write files with specified content
content:
# File Creator

Help users create files with specified content.

## Capabilities
- Create text files, markdown, JSON, and code files
- Use the Write tool to save files
- Suggest appropriate file names and extensions

## Usage
When the user asks to create a file:
1. Confirm the filename and content
2. Use the Write tool to create the file
3. Confirm successful creation
